title: Four-way split-brain auth header logic across proxy.rs and providers
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Architectural Alignment / SRP

Location: src/proxy.rs line 1100-1143 (proxy_passthrough) and line 1371-1400 (forward_to_provider) and line 1402-1416 (set_auth_header).

Violation: Three different functions in proxy.rs decide the authentication header format based on the string value of a provider name — and each uses a DIFFERENT discriminator:
  - forward_to_provider (line 1385): `provider.base_url.contains("anthropic")` — URL-substring check.
  - set_auth_header (line 1408): `provider_name == "anthropic"` — exact name check.
  - proxy_anthropic_messages (line 1065): hardcoded Bearer with inline anthropic-beta string.
Plus each provider's adapter (src/providers/*.rs) owns its own get_headers method that ALSO redundantly sets auth — so there are FOUR authoritative header-building sites. This is a classic Big Ball of Mud. The three in-proxy.rs decisions mean that if a new provider needs custom auth (e.g., AWS Bedrock SigV4, Azure OpenAI with api-version query param), the author must modify THREE locations and potentially add a fourth.

The existing ProviderAdapter trait already has `fn get_headers(&self, api_key: &str) -> Vec<(String, String)>` which is the correct abstraction. proxy_passthrough/forward_to_provider don't use it.

Mandated Refactor:
  1. Delete set_auth_header entirely.
  2. Rewrite forward_to_provider to accept `&dyn ProviderAdapter` and call `adapter.get_headers(api_key)` — push the headers into the request builder with a single loop, identical to forward_to_provider_raw_reqwest's pattern at lines 1434-1436.
  3. Rewrite proxy_passthrough: it should obtain the adapter for `state.config.proxy.target`, call adapter.get_headers(api_key), and forward headers. No more base_url substring inspection.
  4. For proxy_anthropic_messages OAuth path, add a dedicated adapter method `fn oauth_headers(&self, bearer_token: &str) -> Vec<(String, String)>` on AnthropicAdapter that returns the full Bearer + anthropic-beta + anthropic-version set. Eliminate the inline magic-string in proxy.rs line 1069.
  5. After refactor, proxy.rs should contain ZERO string comparisons or substring matches on provider names for auth routing.
